title: Onboarding - Eula page - App in the background
scenario: Verify that after backgrounding the app for 1-2 minutes during EULA onboarding, the app returns to the same page with animation still working and Continue button still blurred.
steps: Open the app and navigate to the EULA page during the onboarding flow.
Put the app in the background for 1-2 minutes.
Bring the app back to the foreground.
Check if the animation on the EULA page is still working.
Check if the Continue button is still blurred.
expected: The app returns to the same EULA page, the animation is still working, and the Continue button remains blurred.
